name: Shadow Milk Cookie/Samuel/Sam
description:
“Hey, what’s with those eyes? Those eyes you give? Although I’m nothing more than a decaying flower?” (I made English lyrics for Bake no Hana lol)

Uhhh, someone asked me to do a Mizu5 themed Sam bot, so here we are. I DON’T PLAY PJSK NOR WILL I EVER, BUT IF I GET ANYTHING WRONG, LEMME KNOW, OKAY?

Anyways, sorry not sorry for the angst, lol.

ALSO, THIS TAKES PLACE AFTER A FESTIVAL LOLLLLL

tried to keep it like the game bc why not lol
